title: Tuallly's Cosmetics
description: A Cobblemon addon that adds cosmetics for certain pokemon.
body:
## **Welcome dear trainers**

In this pack there are around 20 New cometics for cobblemon.

**This pack needs to be in both the world's datapack folder and in your resourcepacks**

I love to add more and add you guys's suggestions! If you have any dump them in the form at the bottem!!


<details>
<summary>Cosmetic Items</summary>
  
Archeops: Plume Fossil

Armarouge: Cleanse Tag

Ceruledge: Netherite Sword

Litwik line: Copper

Klefki: String

Sneasler: Poison Barb

Volcarona: Flame Orb

Zoroark (hisuian): Book

Dragapult: Covert Cloak

Drifblim: Shears

Gollet: Expert Belt

Greninja: Hearty Grains

Krookodile: Relic Coin Pouch

Metagross: Protective Pads

Ninetails (alolan): Blue Ice

Qwilfish (hisuian) and Overqwil: Focus Band

Raichu (alolan): Utility Umbrella

Rillaboom: Never Melt Ice (need a better item ;-;)

Ribombee: Iron Sword

Smeargle: Leather

Tyrantrum: Feather

Cyclizar: Everstone, Luminous moss, Assault vest


</details>


<details>
<summary>Cosmetic Suggestion Form</summary>

https://forms.gle/Qg9vcAxLEdNHqgrdA

</details>




In the gallery there are just a few examples of what is in the pack.
